description: AI 生图提示词模板库，用于 PPT 内容生成
golden_rule: 所有 AI 生图禁止图中出现文字，文字由 PPT 后期添加

architecture.name: 架构图模板
architecture.base_prompt: Generate a clean technical architecture diagram for {SYSTEM_NAME}.

flat.prompt_suffix: Style: Modern flat design with clean lines and solid colors. Minimalist aesthetic.

isometric.prompt_suffix: Style: Isometric 3D view with depth and shadows. Professional tech illustration.

3d.prompt_suffix: Style: Realistic 3D render with lighting effects. Premium tech visualization.

dark.prompt_suffix: Style: Dark theme with glowing elements and neon accents. Cyber-tech aesthetic.

layer_templates.three_tier: Layers: Presentation Layer → Business Logic Layer → Data Layer
layer_templates.microservices: Layers: API Gateway → Microservices Cluster → Message Queue → Database Cluster
layer_templates.cloud: Layers: CDN → Load Balancer → Application Servers → Cache → Database
layer_templates.ml_pipeline: Layers: Data Ingestion → Processing → Model Training → Serving → Monitoring

color_schemes.dark_tech: Color scheme: Dark blue (#1E3A5F) and black background with cyan (#00B4D8) and gold (#FFD60A) accents
color_schemes.light_clean: Color scheme: White background with navy blue (#1E3A8A) and teal (#0D9488) elements

example_prompts: Generate a clean technical architecture diagram for AI Recommendation System. Style: Modern flat design. Layers: User Interface → API Gateway → Recommendation Engine → ML Models → Data Lake. Color scheme: Dark blue background with cyan accents. NO TEXT in the image, leave numbered areas (①②③④⑤) for PPT annotation.

Generate a cloud deployment architecture diagram. Style: Isometric 3D view. Components: Users → CDN → Load Balancer → Kubernetes Cluster → RDS → S3. Color scheme: White background with blue and orange elements. NO TEXT in the image.

concept.name: 概念图模板

flowing_data.prompt_suffix: Visual metaphor: Flowing data streams, particles moving through space, representing information flow

connected_network.prompt_suffix: Visual metaphor: Interconnected nodes and edges, representing relationships and connections

growth_tree.prompt_suffix: Visual metaphor: A growing tree with branches representing expansion and development

bridge.prompt_suffix: Visual metaphor: A bridge connecting two sides, representing transformation and progress

lightbulb.prompt_suffix: Visual metaphor: Glowing lightbulb with radiating ideas, representing innovation and insight

puzzle.prompt_suffix: Visual metaphor: Puzzle pieces coming together, representing integration and completeness

style_variations.minimalist: Style: Modern minimalist with clean geometric shapes and ample white space
style_variations.cyberpunk: Style: Cyberpunk aesthetic with neon colors, futuristic elements and dark background
style_variations.corporate: Style: Professional corporate illustration with soft gradients and polished look
style_variations.artistic: Style: Artistic interpretation with watercolor or digital painting effects

example_prompts: Generate a conceptual illustration for Digital Transformation. Visual metaphor: A bridge connecting traditional office to futuristic digital workspace. Style: Modern minimalist. Aspect ratio: default to 16:9 for slides, but adjust when the page format requires. NO TEXT in the image.

Generate a conceptual illustration for AI-Powered Innovation. Visual metaphor: Glowing lightbulb with neural network patterns inside, radiating ideas. Style: Cyberpunk aesthetic. Aspect ratio: default to 16:9 for slides, but adjust when the page format requires. NO TEXT in the image.

flowchart.name: 流程图模板

direction_options.horizontal: Flow direction: Left to right horizontal flow
direction_options.vertical: Flow direction: Top to bottom vertical flow
direction_options.circular: Flow direction: Circular or cyclical flow

step_templates.branching: Steps: Start → Decision point branching to {PATH_A} and {PATH_B} → Merge → End
step_templates.iterative: Steps: Start → Process → Check → Loop back if needed → Complete

style_variations.clean: Style: Clean and modern with rounded rectangles and smooth connectors
style_variations.technical: Style: Technical diagram with precise shapes and data flow indicators
style_variations.playful: Style: Playful with rounded shapes, icons and friendly colors

example_prompts: Generate a User Onboarding flowchart in clean modern style. Flow direction: Left to right. Steps: Sign Up → Email Verification → Profile Setup → Tutorial → Dashboard. NO TEXT in the image, leave numbered areas for PPT annotation.

Generate an Order Processing flowchart in technical style. Flow direction: Vertical. Steps: Order Received → Inventory Check → Payment Processing → Shipping → Delivery Confirmation. Include decision branches. NO TEXT in the image.

dashboard.name: 仪表盘模板
dashboard.base_prompt: Generate a data dashboard background for {DASHBOARD_NAME}.

layout_types.metrics_row: Layout: Top row with 4 metric cards, below is a large chart area
layout_types.balanced: Layout: Left sidebar with metrics, main area with charts and graphs
layout_types.full_chart: Layout: Full-width chart area with subtle grid background

style_variations.dark_analytics: Style: Dark theme analytics dashboard with glowing metrics and subtle grid lines
style_variations.light_modern: Style: Light modern dashboard with card-based layout and soft shadows
style_variations.minimal: Style: Minimal dashboard with clean lines and focus on data visualization

example_prompts: Generate a data dashboard background for Business Analytics. Layout: Top row with metric card areas, main area for charts. Style: Dark theme with blue accents. NO TEXT, NO NUMBERS, only placeholder areas for PPT to add data.
Generate a KPI dashboard background. Layout: 2x2 grid of card areas with icon placeholders. Style: Light modern with subtle gradients. NO TEXT in the image.

timeline.name: 时间线模板

layout_types.horizontal: Layout: Horizontal timeline with milestones left to right
layout_types.vertical: Layout: Vertical timeline with milestones top to bottom
layout_types.road: Layout: Road or path style with milestones as stops

style_variations.clean: Style: Clean horizontal line with circular milestone markers
style_variations.3d_road: Style: 3D perspective road with milestone signs
style_variations.nature: Style: Tree growth style with branches representing time periods

example_prompts: Generate a timeline illustration for Product Roadmap 2024. Layout: Horizontal timeline with 4 quarterly milestone areas. Style: Clean modern with gradient line. NO TEXT, only placeholder shapes for PPT labels.
Generate a company history timeline. Layout: Vertical path style with 5 milestone areas. Style: Professional with connected nodes. NO TEXT in the image.

comparison.name: 对比图模板

layout_types.two_column: Layout: Two side-by-side columns for comparison
layout_types.vs_center: Layout: Central VS divider with elements on both sides

style_variations.balanced: Style: Balanced design with equal visual weight on both sides
style_variations.contrast: Style: High contrast design highlighting differences

example_prompts: Generate a comparison illustration for Traditional vs Cloud Solutions. Layout: Two side-by-side areas with central divider. Style: Balanced design with blue and green color zones. NO TEXT in the image.

Generate a before/after transformation illustration. Layout: Left side showing old/conventional, right side showing new/modern with transition arrow. Style: Transformation with light effects. NO TEXT in the image.

team.name: 团队介绍模板
team.base_prompt: Generate a team display layout for {TEAM_NAME}.

layout_types.grid: Layout: Equal-sized grid layout for team member portraits
layout_types.hierarchical: Layout: Hierarchical layout with leader at top
layout_types.circular: Layout: Circular arrangement with center focus

style_variations.professional: Style: Professional corporate style with clean frames
style_variations.modern: Style: Modern with geometric shapes and gradient backgrounds
style_variations.minimal: Style: Minimal with focus on portrait placeholders

example_prompts: Generate a team display layout for Executive Team. Layout: 2x2 grid with portrait placeholder areas. Style: Professional with subtle frames. NO TEXT, NO FACES, only placeholder areas for photos.
Generate an organization chart background. Layout: Hierarchical with top leader area and team member areas below. Style: Modern with connected lines. NO TEXT in the image.

feature_highlight.name: 功能亮点模板
feature_highlight.base_prompt: Generate a feature highlight illustration for {FEATURE_NAME}.

layout_types.center_focus: Layout: Central hero element with surrounding feature indicators
layout_types.card_grid: Layout: Grid of feature card areas
layout_types.icon_list: Layout: Vertical list with icon areas and content placeholders

style_variations.tech: Style: Tech-focused with glowing elements and circuit patterns
style_variations.friendly: Style: Friendly and approachable with rounded shapes
style_variations.premium: Style: Premium with metallic accents and elegant gradients

example_prompts: Generate a feature highlight illustration for AI Assistant Features. Layout: Central AI brain icon area with 4 surrounding feature indicator areas. Style: Tech-focused with blue glow. NO TEXT in the image.
Generate a product features grid. Layout: 2x2 grid with icon placeholder and content area for each cell. Style: Premium with gradient backgrounds. NO TEXT in the image.

universal_rules.no_text: NO TEXT in the image, NO letters, NO words, NO numbers
universal_rules.placeholder_areas: Leave numbered placeholder areas (①②③④⑤) for PPT to add text labels
universal_rules.aspect_ratio: Aspect ratio: default to 16:9 for standard presentation slides; adjust to 1:1, 9:16 or other ratios when the content format requires
universal_rules.style_consistency: Maintain consistent style across all AI-generated images in the same presentation

tech_dark.name: 科技深色
tech_dark.description: 深蓝/黑背景 + 青/金色强调

tech_light.name: 科技浅色
tech_light.description: 白/浅灰背景 + 深蓝/青色元素

premium_dark.name: 高级深色
premium_dark.description: 深紫/黑背景 + 红/金色强调

friendly_light.name: 友好浅色
friendly_light.description: 白/浅绿背景 + 灰/绿色元素
